arts.ttl: Liverpool FC staff party halted over drug fears
arts.sum: Liverpool FC said it does "not tolerate the use of illegal substances" at any of its events or venues.

arts.ttl: Premier League issue two Andy Robertson statements after Liverpool star sent off
arts.sum: Liverpool defender Andy Robertson was in the thick of the action in his side's clash with Fulham, as the Scot was sent off just 17 minutes into the match for bringing down Harry Wilson

arts.ttl: Andreas Pereira controversially opens the scoring for Fulham against Liverpool - just moments after he avoided being sent off for a foul on Ryan Gravenberch that Mike Dean claimed was '100 per cent a red card'
arts.sum: Andreas Pereira opened the scoring for Fulham against Liverpool, just moments after many felt he should have been sent off for a foul on Ryan Gravenberch.

arts.ttl: Money talks! Liverpool star 'demanding £70k-a-week pay rise' in new contract
arts.sum: Luis Diaz has reportedly presented Liverpool with a significant wage demand, which is more than double his current weekly earnings at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa line up move to sign Fulham star
arts.sum: Premier League clubs Aston Villa, Newcastle United, and Tottenham Hotspur are all reportedly interested in securing the services of the 28-year-old Fulham midfielder Andreas Pereira, according to Trivela. arts.ttl: Liverpool v Fulham line-ups: Three Whites changes, four for Liverpool

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez benched as big Liverpool returns confirmed for Fulham
arts.sum: Arne Slot has named his Liverpool XI for the Premier League clash with Fulham at Anfield on Saturday

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Fulham LIVE: Premier League team news and line-ups as Diogo Jota back on the bench for Reds
arts.sum: After the postponement of the Merseyside derby, Arne Slot’s side look to build on a four-point advantage atop the Premier League

arts.ttl: Liverpool target teases January transfer after leaving PSG 'furious'
arts.sum: Cherki was already expected to get sold in the summer as he only had a year left to run on his contract but no transfer ultimately materialised, which prompted Lyon to extend the homegrown's deal by a year. The French youth international is one of the players expected to be sacrificed as Lyon seek to raise funds to stave off their provisional relegation to Ligue 2.

arts.ttl: Player provides insight into life under Arne Slot – Liverpool manager worked wonders for him
arts.sum: It’s fair to say that Arne Slot has made a positive impression at Liverpool so far, slotting in seamlessly at the club and enjoying plenty of success to date. It’s been a seamless transition from the Jurgen Klopp era, with the Dutchman’s ideas and implantation of them seemingly smooth and well received so far.
